title: Norms for Parish Pastoral Councils – Diocese of Pensacola-Tallahassee
summary: Establishes the bishop's binding norms for the formation, membership, governance, and meeting requirements of Parish Pastoral Councils throughout the Diocese of Pensacola-Tallahassee.
notes: 1) The document is labeled 'Appendix 2,' indicating it is embedded within a larger governing document; the parent document's title, chapter, and section numbering are unknown, making a precise address assignment impossible. 2) The effective date is inferred from the bishop's letter date of January 21, 2004; the 'Rev 8/14' header suggests a revision in August 2014, used here as the last review date, but no day is specified so the first of the month is assumed. 3) No explicit next-review date or review cadence is stated. 4) No retention period is specified. 5) The responsible diocesan role is unclear; the Office of Bishop is cited as the issuing authority, but day-to-day ownership likely falls to the Vicar General or Chancellor—confidence is low. 6) The norms reference canon 536 but do not address removal of council members, term limits, or dissolution procedures, which a human reviewer may wish to flag as gaps.
